No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly supports contributions to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly supports contributions to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly aims to 'promote physical and mental development' and includes 'sports injury prevention,' directly supporting Target 3.4 on well-being and disease prevention.
evidence: 促進身心發展及培養終身運動之觀念

Quality Education.reason: As a required university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and fosters relevant skills and a sustainable lifestyle through lifelong exercise (Target 4.4, 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly 'male and female co-ed,' ensuring equal access and non-discrimination in sports education, directly supporting Target 5.1.
evidence: 體育[男女合班]—桌球初級

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly supports contributions to clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly supports contributions to decent work or economic growth.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly supports contributions to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The co-ed nature of the course promotes social inclusion irrespective of sex in the learning environment, aligning with Target 10.2.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly supports contributions to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly supports contributions to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly supports contributions to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course introduces 'etiquette and rules' for table tennis, which can be seen as a minor, inferred contribution to promoting the rule of law and peaceful interaction (Target 16.3).
